import re
AR_DIACRITICS = re.compile(r"[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]")
TATWEEL = re.compile(r"[\u0640]")
PUNCT = re.compile(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]+", re.UNICODE)

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    s = s.strip()
    # Lowercase
    s = s.lower()
    # Remove diacritics and tatweel
    s = AR_DIACRITICS.sub("", s)
    s = TATWEEL.sub("", s)
    # Normalize hamza forms
    s = (s.replace("أ","ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("آ","ا")
           .replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ة","ه").replace("ى","ي"))
    # Remove punctuation
    s = PUNCT.sub(" ", s)
    # Collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # char-level LCS
    # DP with memory O(min(n,m))
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            tmp = dp[j]
            if a[i-1] == b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = dp[j] if dp[j] >= dp[j-1] else dp[j-1]
            prev = tmp
    return dp[m]

def lcs_ratio(a, b):
    if not a or not b:
        return 0.0
    L = lcs_length(a, b)
    return L / max(len(a), len(b))

def token_f1(a, b):
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    sa = set(ta)
    sb = set(tb)
    if not sa and not sb:
        return 1.0
    if not sa or not sb:
        return 0.0
    inter = sa & sb
    p = len(inter) / len(sa)
    r = len(inter) / len(sb)
    if p+r == 0:
        return 0.0
    return 2*p*r/(p+r)

def combined_score(a, b):
    return 0.5*lcs_ratio(a,b) + 0.5*token_f1(a,b)

def find_best_matches(text, candidates, topn=10):
    nt = normalize_arabic(text)
    scores = []
    for i, cand in enumerate(candidates):
        nc = normalize_arabic(cand)
        score = combined_score(nt, nc)
        scores.append((score, i, cand))
    scores.sort(reverse=True)
    return scores[:topn]

snippet = "وَإِن يُرِ...ءٍ أَمْرِي"

nt_full, len(nt_full)

q_verses = [x['ayah_text'] for x in quran]
best_q = find_best_matches(original_full, q_verses, topn=20)
best_q[:10]
